subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! Two months ago a detailed letter was dispatched through travelers bound for Qazvin. Now again [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی میثاق دو ماه قبل مکتوبی مفصل بواسطه مسافرین قزوین ارسال شد حال نیز
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
